name: New England Clam Chowder Quiche
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons parsley flakes, or fresh parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake crust for 8 minutes in a 400°F oven.
2. Remove the shell from the hot crust.
3. Reduce heat to 325°F.
4. In a bowl, combine bacon, clam chowder, eggs, onion, sour cream, parsley, and pepper; mix well.
5. Pour about two-thirds of the mixture into the baked shell.
6. Arrange cheese slices on top.
7. Pour remaining mixture over the cheese.
8. Bake at 325°F for 50-55 minutes or until set.
9. Cool for 20 minutes before cutting and serving.
